findings.message: Container 'ssh-container' exposes administration service port 22 (SSH). This increases the attack surface and may lead to unauthorized access or privilege escalation.
Container 'telnet-container' exposes administration service port 23 (Telnet). This increases the attack surface and may lead to unauthorized access or privilege escalation.
Container 'windows-container' exposes administration service port 3389 (RDP (Remote Desktop Protocol)). This increases the attack surface and may lead to unauthorized access or privilege escalation.
Container 'vnc-container' exposes administration service port 5900 (VNC). This increases the attack surface and may lead to unauthorized access or privilege escalation.
Container 'winrm-container' exposes administration service port 5985 (WinRM (HTTP)). This increases the attack surface and may lead to unauthorized access or privilege escalation.
Container 'winrm-secure-container' exposes administration service port 5986 (WinRM (HTTPS)). This increases the attack surface and may lead to unauthorized access or privilege escalation.
Container 'rsync-container' exposes administration service port 873 (rsync). This increases the attack surface and may lead to unauthorized access or privilege escalation.
